title: test(1796e): add 9 tests for internal-chat-conversations.ts
body:
## Summary

9 new tests for internal-chat-conversations.ts. Zero prior coverage.


### ensureDirectConversation — 5 tests

Finds or creates a DM between two accounts:
- Returns existing DM when a shared conversation already exists (via count=2 query + findFirst)
- Creates new DM when no shared conversation exists (two insert calls)
- Inserts two member records when creating new conversation
- Throws when findFirst throws during existing DM lookup
- Throws when insert throws during new conversation creation

### archiveConversationByAccount — 4 tests

Removes a member from a conversation, deletes it if empty:
- Returns `{ archived: true }` when membership exists
- Deletes only membership when other members remain (findMany returns non-empty → only 1 delete call)
- Deletes both membership and conversation when it becomes empty (findMany returns empty → 2 delete calls)
- Calls `getRequiredConversationForAccount` before any deletions

### Key mocking insight

`archiveConversationByAccount` calls `findMany` twice: once in the setup mock returning the member, and then again *after* membership deletion to check if the conversation should be deleted. The test uses a mutable state flag to return empty on the second call.

All 9 tests pass.
Part of #1796 coverage expansion.
head: fix/1796e-internal-chat-conversations-tests
